store_headline: Vibrant Music WordPress Theme for Bands and Artists
store_subheadline: Showcase releases, tour dates, videos, and merch with a bold, glitch-effect design.
features: Vibrant and colorful design aesthetic tailored for musicians
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Wolf Visual Composer extension with custom music elements
Advanced playlist manager for music playback
Video gallery for showcasing music videos
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
selling_points: Glitch-effect red/cyan duotone photography — the most immediately distinctive visual treatment in the music theme catalog
Hand-lettered grunge font creates a DIY-punk-meets-digital brand identity no other music theme replicates
WPBakery-powered with full music feature set: discography, playlist, events, videos, and WooCommerce merch
The colorful multi-page alternative to one-page competitors and bright counterpoint to dark music themes
Built for indie, alternative, and electronic artists who want visual attitude without darkness or aggression
Photo album galleries and masonry blog layouts for visually ambitious artists who curate their aesthetic
Duotone glitch effects give band photography a consistent visual treatment across every page
Wishlist functionality and WooCommerce integration for fan merch sales without a separate store
key_benefits: Stand out with glitch-effect duotone photography no competitor replicates
Carry your visual identity across a multi-page site from releases to tours
Attract fans who care about aesthetics as much as sound
Sell merch through WooCommerce that maintains the punk-art-school energy of your site
Build a complete music presence: discography, playlist, events, and blog
Make your band look poster-worthy, not template-made
Launch your discography and tour campaign with a visual identity that works
design_features: Vibrant color schemes and bold typography
Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: The theme itself is beautiful! Such a well done theme that has amazing variety, substitutions and options to choose from. The creator makes it super easy to customize and includes all the .psd and .ai files for you to edit and adapt to your website needs. Very happy that the creator was also quickly able to respond to my questions, one of the bets support teams and theme on Envato!
testimonials.author: pixlrllc

testimonials.text: A few months later, my project is now available online and I still get an amazing support from the customer support team each time I need it. Great job! Thank you so much.
testimonials.author: emelinedesign

testimonials.text: Great theme and super support! Recommended for those who want to do well without wasting time.
testimonials.author: lamorfalab
